ATL.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Core includes Johnson, Daniels, McCollum, Kuminga. Limited flexibility.

BOS.note: Tatum healthy. Hard-capped at first apron. Core with Tatum, White, Vucevic. Limited flexibility.

BKN.note: $11.75M cap space, not hard-capped. Acquired Randle. Young core, potential buyer.

CHA.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Young core with Ball, Miller. Mid-tier tradable contracts.

CHI.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Used cap space on signings. Young core, limited flexibility.

CLE.note: Capped out, over second apron. Mitchell, Mobley, Harden core. Very limited flexibility.

DET.note: Young core led by Cunningham. Cap space available. Potential buyer at deadline.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy. Hard-capped at first apron. Core is set, limited flexibility.

MIA.note: Giannis acquired. Hard-capped at first apron. Veteran core, limited flexibility.

MIL.note: Giannis traded. Retooling with Herro, young talent, cap space. High upside.

NYK.note: Capped out, over first apron. Towns, Anunoby, Brunson core. Limited flexibility.

ORL.note: Young core with Banchero, Wagner. Over first apron, near second. Limited flexibility.

PHI.note: Capped out, over tax. Embiid, Brown, Maxey, George core. Limited flexibility.

TOR.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Kawhi, Barnes core. Limited flexibility for trades.

WAS.note: #1 pick Dybantsa. Davis, Young core. Hard-capped at first apron. Limited flexibility.

DAL.note: Anthony Davis on roster. Capped out, over second apron. Limited flexibility for trades.

DEN.note: Capped out, over second apron. Jokic, Murray, Gordon lead expensive core. Limited flexibility.

GSW.note: Hard-capped at second apron. Curry, Butler, Green, Porzingis core. Moody injured.

HOU.note: Hard-capped at second apron. Durant, Sengun, VanVleet core. Limited flexibility.

LAC.note: Significant cap space. Acquired Ingram, Dick. Potential buyer for a star.

LAL.note: Doncic-led team. Hard-capped at first apron. Roster mostly set, limited flexibility.

MEM.note: Cap space available. Young core, acquired assets via trade. Potential buyer.

MIN.note: Hard-capped at second apron. Edwards, Ball, Gobert core. Limited flexibility.

NOP.note: Zion healthy. Over cap, under first apron. Poole's contract is a trade chip.

OKC.note: Capped out, well over second apron. SGA, Holmgren, Williams core. Very limited flexibility.

PHX.note: Under first apron, some cap flexibility. Booker is the star. Potential for upgrades.

POR.note: Morant acquired. Lillard returning from Achilles. Over cap, under first apron.

SAC.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Sabonis, LaVine, Hunter core. Limited flexibility for trades.

SAS.note: Deep young core (Wemby, Castle, Harper). Hard-capped at first apron. Prioritizing short-term deals.

UTA.note: Hard-capped at first apron. Young core with Markkanen, Jackson Jr. Flexibility for complementary pieces.
